history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark hair, seen from behind, stands on a grassy mountain slope, wearing a white shirt and a black backpack. He is looking out at a breathtaking vista of a majestic, cloud-shrouded volcano. The foreground is dominated by lush green grass and some sparse bushes and trees. A sea of fluffy white clouds stretches out below, obscuring the base of the volcano, creating an ethereal, dreamlike atmosphere. The volcano itself, a towering peak, pierces through the clouds, its slopes softened by a hazy, atmospheric perspective. The sky above is a clear, pale blue with a few wispy clouds. The lighting suggests early morning or late afternoon, with a soft, diffused sunlight illuminating the scene and casting gentle shadows. The color palette is dominated by natural greens of the grass, the cool blues of the sky and mountain, and the stark white of the clouds. The overall mood is one of awe, tranquility, and a sense of adventure. The image has a slightly grainy, video-like quality, perhaps from a smartphone recording. The style is realistic, capturing the grandeur of nature.
